params.name: Hercules the Archer
params.description:
On May 3, 1909 AD, Bourdelle completed this statue.
Hercules the Archer is one of the representative works of the French sculptor Bourdelle. Unlike the Academic style sculptures that attempt to reproduce the perfect human form, this statue shows a solemn and monumental character, using the curve of the bow and the exaggerated body shape to present the beauty of this hero's strength and display the artist's unique creative skills.
